mapper.select: SELECT id, name, enc_rrn, address, phone, last_visit_date, created_at, updated_at FROM hp_patients WHERE name = #{name} AND phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hp_patients (name, enc_rrn, address, phone, last_visit_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{encRrn}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{lastVisitDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE hp_patients SET enc_rrn = #{encRrn}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
